blocks.content: Child policies are managed on the same Notification policies page as the default policy. In this milestone you navigate to the page where the full policy tree is displayed.
To navigate to Notification policies, complete the following steps:
In Grafana Cloud, navigate to **Alerts & IRM > Alerting > Notification policies** from the main menu.

You should see the notification policy tree with the default policy at the top and any existing child policies below it.

In the next milestone, you will create a new child policy.
